problem: Is dopamine dysregulation cause or effect in schizophrenia — what is primary?
mechanism: Deep brain stimulation of subthalamic nucleus
hypothesis: Is dopamine dysregulation cause or effect in schizophrenia — what is primary? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Deep. Deep brain stimulation of subthalamic nucleus directly addresses this.
